creator: tgyurci@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 148610
LIB_DEPENDS instead of BUILD_ and RUN_DEPENDS patch

The devel/tevent and databases/ldb port Makefiles define their RUN_DEPEDS variable to be the same as the BUILD_DEPENDS variable. This implies that the built packages depend on the pkgconf package (and the xsltproc package when building manual pages). These are build-only dependencies, they are not needed for the binary packages.
